seo.title: Yordan Ivanov - Data Engineering Leadership
seo.description: I help data engineers handle the side of the job that isn't code. Writing about project ownership, career growth, and getting promoted.

sections.title: The Side of Data Engineering That Isn't Code
sections.subtitle: I write about how to actually own a project, navigate the market, and get promoted without becoming a corporate politician.

sections.heading: What people say about my work
sections.quote: This is why I follow Yordan's posts, it comes from experience, its valuable, and its real. Because its clearly written a bit hastily by a senior engineer and not by an AI.
sections.author: Andreas Ährlund-Richter, Data Engineer

sections.title: Get the Data Engineer's Business Translation Kit
sections.description: A free framework for translating your technical work into revenue, cost, or risk language. Plus a career leveling matrix showing what separates Senior from Lead. Join 7,000+ data engineers.
